message:
fix(install,stats): recursive dir removal + timestamp parse safety

- install.rs: remove_directory_contents now recurses into
  subdirectories instead of silently skipping them, preventing
  ENOTEMPTY failures during uninstall.

- stats.rs: timestamp_delta_secs returns Option<f64> instead of
  silently returning 0.0 on parse failure, preventing silent
  corruption of pressure-level time percentages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
